name: Rorschach Plus
short_description: Rorschach Plus is a precise, experimental puzzle platformer where you use paint to reveal your surroundings.
detailed_description:
Rorschach Plus is a precise, experimental puzzle platformer where you use paint to reveal your surroundings. Platforming through the levels is only half the challenge, the other is figuring out exactly what you're platforming through. Originally conceived by WhyCardBoard as a submission for a game jam in 2019, the game has been redesigned, refined, and tweaked into the version it is today.

Here's what you need to know. Rorschach Plus has:

  • more than 70 puzzle-platforming challenges to conquer
  • 14 fresh achievements
  • a funky chiptune soundtrack by Rolemusic
  • the same creator who made "Crate Succ," so you know it's gotta be good
  • an achievement for cheating
  • a concept entirely based on an idea that I stole from one of the funny little people in my phone

"You know Fortnite? This is that, but better."
